The '''palace of Gorga the Hutt''' was located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and was similar in form and function to the structure inhabited by his late uncle [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. It was used primarily as a vacation retreat overseen by [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga's]] [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]], [[Ding (majordomo)|Ding]]. [[5 ABY/Legends|One year]] after [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] had fallen to the [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Monks]], Gorga's Palace had become the new headquarters of [[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|his resurrected Empire]].
